yaml_definition:
name: list_orders
description: 查询订单列表，支持按订单名称、订单ID、下单人和下单时间筛选
method: GET
url: /api/orders
parameters:
  type: object
  properties:
    name:
      type: string
      description: 订单名称，支持模糊搜索
      in: query
    id:
      type: string
      description: 订单ID
      in: query
    user:
      type: string
      description: 下单人姓名
      in: query
    date:
      type: string
      description: 下单时间，日期格式
      in: query
  required: []
response:
  type: object
  properties:
    data:
      type: array
      description: 订单列表
      items:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            type: string
            description: 订单ID
          name:
            type: string
            description: 订单名称
          user:
            type: string
            description: 下单人
          amount:
            type: integer
            description: 订单金额
          status:
            type: string
            description: 订单状态
          time:
            type: string
            description: 下单时间
    total:
      type: integer
      description: 订单总数
name: list_orders
description: 查询订单列表，支持按订单名称、订单ID、下单人和下单时间筛选

name.description: 订单名称，支持模糊搜索
